No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to poverty eradication or related targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: While 'Food' is a topic, it focuses on likes/dislikes, not hunger, nutrition, or sustainable food systems.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No evidence in the syllabus relates to health, well-being, disease prevention, or healthcare access.

Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education (4.3) and explicitly fosters cultural understanding and an international perspective (4.7), aligning strongly with global citizenship.
